results.textSample: LH La Hacienda Mexican Restaurant ABOUT MENU CONTACT MORE ▾ Home About Menu News Contact OPEN NOW · CLOSES IN 10H 37M ☰ View Menu Authentic Mexican favorites in East Dundee. Tacos, burritos, tortas, fajitas, horchata, and fast pickup at 411 E Main St — with clear calls, directions, menu, and order links. VIEW MENU LOCAL FAVORITES Fast pickup, familiar favorites, and one-tap next steps. Locals keep coming back for burritos, tacos, tortas, chimichangas, fajitas, pico, green salsa, chips and salsa, horchata, tamales, and enchiladas. Favorites, phone number, directions, and online ordering are easy to find before you head over. CALL LA HACIENDA ☎ (847) 426-0506 GUEST FAVORITES Tacos, burritos, tortas, and specials are easy to find before you go. Burritos & Chimichangas → Tacos & Salsa → Tortas & Specials → Browse tacos, burritos, tortas, hours, and next steps before you head over. TOP TACO PICKS Carne Asada Taco $3.95 Broiled skirt steak and one of the clearest taco favorites. Carnitas Taco $3.95 A regular favorite guests keep coming back for. Al Pastor Taco $3.95 A classic pick alongside carne asada, carnitas, and chorizo. Chile Relleno Taco $4.00 Stuffed pepper with beans, rice, lettuce, and tomatoes. BURRITOS, TORTAS, SPECIALS Regular Burrito $8.99 Giant flour tortilla with rice, beans, lettuce, cheese, and choice of protein. Burrito Combination $9.99 Two-meat burrito for guests who want a bigger order. Cubana Torta $12.00 Breaded steak, ham, chorizo, eggs, and no lettuce. Everyday Special $11.75 Two regular tacos or one regular burrito with fries and a canned drink. WHAT REGULARS SAY “La Hacienda already has what neighborhood restaurants are built on: generous portions, fast takeout, friendly service, and regulars who have been coming back for years.” LOCAL REVIEW THEMES Regulars, takeout, tacos, and salsa PLAN YOUR VISIT Everything guests need before they head over MENU Open the full menu when you want more than the highlights. results.textSample: LH La Hacienda Mexican Restaurant ABOUT MENU CONTACT MORE ▾ Home About Menu News Contact OPEN NOW · CLOSES IN 10H 37M ☰ View Menu Menu highlights and popular favorites Start with tacos, burritos, tortas, specials, and the favorites local guests mention most. Prices can change, so call to confirm tonight’s menu. TACOS Street taco standouts Carne Asada $3.95 Broiled skirt steak. Carnitas $3.95 Fried pork. Chorizo $3.95 Mexican sausage. Al Pastor $3.95 Roasted pork. BURRITOS Large-format favorites Regular Burrito $8.99 Rice, beans, lettuce, cheese, and your choice of protein. Burrito Combination $9.99 Two-meat combination burrito. Huevos con Carne Asada $8.99 Eggs and steak burrito variation. Burrito con Papas $8.25 Potato burrito. TORTAS Mexican-style sandwiches Chorizo con Huevo $9.50 Mexican sausage with eggs. Carne Asada con Huevo $9.50 Steak with eggs. Pechuga a la Plancha $9.99 Chicken breast on the griddle. Cubana $12.00 Breaded steak, ham, chorizo, eggs, and no lettuce. SPECIALS Specials and bigger plates Everyday Special $11.75 Two regular tacos or one regular burrito with fries and a canned drink. Monday Special $12.50 Two gorditas with rice, beans, and a regular drink. Thursday Special $19.99 Three regular tortas. Parrillada See menu Shrimp, chicken, and steak platter for two or three with quesadillas and guacamole.
